title: StructuredPrompt
description: Output of the JARVIS Pre-Processor Stage 2. Consumed by the Complexity Classifier.

task.description: What to delegate to the agent (Delegation + Discernment). Empty string only when input was empty.

context.description: Relevant background provided by the user (Description). May be empty string.

constraints.description: What the agent must avoid or follow (Description). May be empty string.

expected_output.description: Desired response format and detail level (Description). May be empty string.

incomplete.description: True when Diligence determined the prompt is missing critical context and requires user clarification before dispatch.

examples.task: Book a flight to Lisbon on Friday
examples.context: Departure city not specified; budget constraint is 500 euros
examples.expected_output: Flight options with price, airline, and departure time

examples.task: Set a timer for five minutes
examples.expected_output: Confirmation that the timer has been set
